The '''Central Academic Hospital''' was a medical facility located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] pilot [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] was treated at this [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]] when the [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] visited the planet after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 7]] {{1st}}
